configure.title: Label (for accessibility)
configure.description: Accessible label for the tab set.

configure.title: Sticky
configure.desc: Horizontal tabs stick to the top of the window when scrolling.
configure.description: Keep horizontal tabs at the top while scrolling.

configure.title: Layout Breakpoint
configure.description: Breakpoint for horizontal tabs; use -1 for vertical-only.

configure.title: Icon Breakpoint
configure.description: Breakpoint for showing text with icons. Default is 0; use -1 for icon-only mode.

advanced.title: Unique ID
advanced.description: Unique ID for this tab set.
